About Trait Sniper

Who we are & Why we are here
Trait Sniper issues the only ecological token, which has both practical and governance functions, with a total circulation of 1,000,000,000,000.As a veteran tool in the NFT field, Trait Sniper believes that Web3 should not only exist as an individual, but as a closely integrated whole that can connect all value creators and participants. Therefore, we decided to upgrade across the board.The goal of TraitSniper is to identify and gather every valuable user, closely connect them with various high-quality projects and communities, build a comprehensive and effective Web3 social financial influence network, and provide real and meaningful application scenarios for SocialFi.We believe that through our efforts and continuous innovation, Trait Sniper will become an important link connecting the global Web3 social financial eco system, create the most extensive and valuable influence network, and build a rich SocialFi ecosystem around it.

Roadmap

  • Phase 1
    Project Launch, AI-generated Tweets, $TS Airdrop
  • Phase 2
    DEX Liquidity, Influencer Network Initiation, Staking&Mining, $TS Burning
  • Phase 3
    CMC/CoinGecko Listing, Project Customized Cooperation
  • Phase 4
    CEX Listing, Influencer Network Expansion
